description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Deliverable:
Wire bare-module union hashing into both detectors. ApiBoundary.check_binding/3 and Implementation.check_subject/5 (or equivalent) recognize bare-module entries and call Canonical.hash_module_head_union/2 or hash_module_full_union/2 respectively. Add inferred? boolean field to the binding_ref shape (default false). ApiBoundary.check_binding/3's {:error, :not_found, ...} arm consults inferred? and returns [] when inferred? is true. Implementation tier is unchanged for inferred? — it still emits its own dangling. The flag does NOT appear on any finding map.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: api_boundary_test.exs and implementation_test.exs cover (a) bare-module entry resolves to Canonical hash; (b) inferred?: true + :not_found returns []; (c) inferred?: false + :not_found returns the dangling; (d) property test asserting no finding contains :inferred? or 'inferred?'.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: spec requirements specled.realized_by.bare_module_api_boundary_hash (detector wiring), bare_module_implementation_hash (detector wiring), implication_dangling_once (suppression), binding_ref_inferred_no_leak.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator.ex (S5)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/effective_binding.ex (S2)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/canonical.ex (S3)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/closure.ex (no closure walk from bare modules)
- .spec/**
Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/realization/api_boundary.ex
- lib/specled_ex/realization/implementation.ex
- test/specled_ex/realization/api_boundary_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/realization/implementation_test.exs

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT seed the closure walker from bare-module entries.
- Do NOT add inferred?-related logic to the implementation tier (the impl tier's own dangling is the surviving finding).
- Do NOT change the public shape of finding maps. The inferred? flag is orchestrator-internal only.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S4: ApiBoundary + Implementation bare-module + inferred?
